items.title: Apple’s MacBook Neo is winning over a new generation of buyers
items.content: The MacBook Neo shipped 1.1 million units in its first weeks on sale, IDC estimates, as Apple pushes deeper into the mainstream laptop market.

items.title: Sneak peek at new Siri app reveals Apple’s plans to take on ChatGPT and more
items.content: New renders offer a closer look at Apple’s planned AI overhaul for iOS 27, including a redesigned Siri experience and standalone Siri app.

items.title: These special phone and app features can help protect you from spyware
items.content: Apple, Meta, and Google offer special security modes that provide your devices more secure against targeted spyware attacks. Here are how those modes work, what they do, and h

items.title: Apple says Epic lawsuit shouldn’t reshape App Store rules for all developers
items.content: Apple is asking the Supreme Court to narrow the App Store injunction won by Epic Games and overturn the court’s contempt ruling over external payment fees.

items.title: Nvidia chases $200B CPU market with AI agent PCs from Microsoft, Dell, and HP
items.content: If Nvidia has cracked a way to bring AI agents easily, safely, and usefully to the masses, it could — and should — be big.

items.title: ‘What a joke’: GitHub Copilot’s new token-based billing spurs consternation among devs
items.content: The golden age of Microsoft's GitHub Copilot appears to be at an end.

items.title: Microsoft under fire for threatening security researcher with criminal investigation
items.content: A public spat between Microsoft and an independent security researcher reopens a long-running debate over who is responsible for securing software.

items.title: Scammers are abusing an internal Microsoft account to send spam links
items.content: The loophole allows spammers and scammers to send emails from a legitimate Microsoft email address typically used for sending genuine account alerts.

items.title: MSC Ship Is Struck by Two Projectiles in Iraqi Port
items.content: The attack on the vessel, owned by the Mediterranean Shipping Company, underlines the threat to ships even as the U.S. and Iran try to negotiate reopening the Strait of Hormuz

items.title: Stephen Curry and Li-Ning: What to Know About N.B.A. Star’s Deal With Chinese Sneaker Company
items.content: The agreement, which includes plans for sportswear and athleisure products, and stores across the United States and China, is the latest example of an N.B.A. star signing with

items.title: New Proposal Would Allow Administration to Block Grants if They Don’t Support Trump’s Agenda
items.content: A new proposal would allow the administration to block grants if they do not satisfy President Trump’s agenda or support what it calls “anti-American” values.

items.title: Trump Megadonor Gave $5.5 Million Estate to Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s Anti-Vaccine Group
items.content: A Mellon heir transferred the adjacent Connecticut properties, covering about 300 acres, at no cost to Children’s Health Defense last year.
